subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! From the contents of thy musk-scented letter was obtained the sweetness of honey and nectar, for it attesteth to faith [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق از مضمون نامه مشکین حلاوت شهد و انکبین حاصل زیرا دلیل بر ایمان و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
